claim_boundary: G005 bounded prefix candidate for public FDM-1 recipe reproduction on D2E using temporal sequence-level masked action-token diffusion over compact luma video tokens. Not G005 completion evidence.

video_encoder.input: D2E compact luma16 frame-window video tokens over a temporal row window
video_encoder.public_anchor: FDM-1 trains directly on compressed screen-video representations before inverse-dynamics labeling.
video_encoder.approximation: Open D2E approximation: compact luma-window CNN with masked luma-token reconstruction, not the closed-source SI tokenizer.

idm_objective.corruption: mask/random corruption over temporal action-token slots
idm_objective.loss: weighted cross entropy over keyboard, mouse-button, mouse-move, scroll, and no-op action tokens across a temporal window

inference_schedule.selection: iteratively unmask highest-confidence temporal action-token slots, then emit the center-row action tokens for D2E paper metrics

inferred_or_novel_components: center-row emission for D2E paper-compatible metrics
bounded prefix row budget before full-corpus promotion

temporal_sequence_masked_diffusion.public_anchor: FDM-1 IDM predicts masked action-token sequences noncausally from all frames and iteratively unmasks high-confidence positions.
temporal_sequence_masked_diffusion.d2e_approximation: Use D2E compact luma frame-window tokens and a local temporal action-token sequence around each row.
temporal_sequence_masked_diffusion.claim_boundary: Open recipe approximation on D2E; no FDM-1 internal-parity claim.

video_encoder_pretraining.public_anchor: FDM-1 reports a video encoder trained with masked compression/self-supervised prediction.
video_encoder_pretraining.d2e_approximation: Masked luma-token reconstruction pretraining over compact D2E frame-window tokens.
